title: Implement gRPC for Internal Communication
description: Implement gRPC for high-frequency internal service-to-service communication. Utilize Protobuf's binary serialization for efficient data exchange. Design APIs with strict schema evolution to ensure compatibility across service versions.
objectives: Implement gRPC for high-frequency internal service-to-service communication.
Utilize Protobuf's binary serialization for efficient data exchange.
Design APIs with strict schema evolution to ensure compatibility across service versions.
